name: Radiometric and Chemical Measurements from Cryoconite Samples, Flade Isblink Ice Cap, Greenland
description: Dataset containing radiometric (e.g., 137Cs, 210Pb, 241Am, Pu isotopes) and chemical (e.g., LOI, Carb, 40K) measurements from cryoconite samples collected at the Flade Isblink ice cap in Greenland. Includes sample metadata such as location, depth, type, and collection date/time.
